shellCommands.command:
SERVER_PORT=3000 java -jar target/*.jar &
sleep 5
echo "--- Get / without name ---"
curl -s http://localhost:3000/
echo
echo "--- Get / with name=Alice ---"
curl -s "http://localhost:3000/?name=Alice"
echo
echo "--- Get / with whitespace name ---"
curl -s "http://localhost:3000/?name=%20%20Bob%20%20"
echo
echo "--- Get / with empty name ---"
curl -s "http://localhost:3000/?name="
echo
echo "--- Get / with only-spaces name ---"
curl -s "http://localhost:3000/?name=%20%20"
echo
kill %1 2>/dev/null
wait %1 2>/dev/null
